github-scout 2026-06-25：Agent Eval Frameworks 研究筆記

專案觀測摘要

本輪主題：agent_eval_frameworks（近期 agent_memory、skill_marketplace、agent_architecture 已覆蓋）

evidence_snapshot: REST api.github.com 2026-06-25T04:41+00:00

改進提案

P1-A [strands-agents/evals] post_tool_logger input_keys 補欄位

eval_scope: trajectory (OTel spans per tool call) metrics: tool_parameter_accuracy F1, task_completion_rate, step_efficiency integration: hooks/post_tool_logger.py +input_keys (<10行); jsonl_to_otel_span.py Phase1+3 done rollback: revert post_tool_logger commit feasibility=8, stability=8 backlog_id: backlog_github_scout_20260625_124156273683

P1-B [confident-ai/deepteam] pre_bash_guard 對抗性紅隊測試

eval_scope: adversarial (jailbreak/prompt-injection) metrics: attack_success_rate, defense_robustness_score, vulnerability_coverage integration: deepteam CLI → security_audit_12h 或 CI rollback: remove from CI feasibility=8, stability=7 backlog_id: backlog_github_scout_20260625_124206064281

P2 [langchain-ai/agentevals] trajectory_match for done_cert

eval_scope: trajectory (multi-step 路徑匹配) metrics: trajectory_match(0-1), tool_call_accuracy, answer_relevancy integration: 需 LangSmith 或自建 backend，成本較高 feasibility=7, stability=7 backlog_id: backlog_github_scout_20260625_124213348067

P3 [awslabs/agent-evaluation] 停更（2025-12-15），觀察中

已落實

skills/github-scout/SKILL.md triggers 新增：deepteam、red team LLM、adversarial agent testing、langchain-ai/agentevals 等 10 詞條（2026-06-25）

待人工審核

  • P1-A: docs/plans/github-scout-strands-evals-input-keys.md
  • P1-B: docs/plans/github-scout-deepteam-adversarial-guard.md
